event: Still Life with Fish, Wine, and Fruit
description: A dark, richly textured still life showing several large fish hanging vertically, their silvery scales catching the light. Below them, a dark wine bottle stands amid a collection of fruits—apples, possibly pomegranates—in reds, yellows, and oranges. The background is very dark, with thick, expressive brushstrokes throughout. The overall palette is warm with flashes of iridescent color on the fish scales.
